Nav.announcement: MR 2% Commission · 32 Years In Business · No One Does It Better

Hero.headline: No One Does It Better
Hero.subcopy: South Florida's most trusted brokerage — helping families buy, sell, rent, and finance their dream homes for over three decades.

Programs.label: Mortgage Programs
Programs.subcopy: KLE Mortgage's licensed loan originators find the right program for your unique situation — not just the standard option.
Programs.p1Desc: First-time buyers guided from pre-approval to closing. Low down payments, competitive rates.
Programs.p2Desc: Special mortgage benefits for Florida's teachers, nurses, law enforcement, and firefighters.
Programs.p3Desc: Government-backed financing with flexible credit requirements. Accessible for moderate credit or limited savings.
Programs.p4Desc: Zero down payment and no PMI for veterans and active military. You served — let us serve you.
Programs.p5Desc: Qualify on property cash flow, not personal income. Built for real estate investors expanding their portfolio.
Programs.p6Desc: Zero down for eligible rural and suburban properties. Government-backed with competitive rates.

FeaturedListings.label: Featured Listings
FeaturedListings.emptyTitle: No featured properties at this time.
FeaturedListings.emptyCta: Contact us to find your perfect home

Valuation.label: Free Home Valuation
Valuation.subcopy: Get a free, no-obligation home valuation from South Florida's most trusted brokerage — 32 years of experience, thousands of homes closed.
Valuation.valueProp1: Accurate market analysis based on real comps
Valuation.errorPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.
Valuation.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Valuation.privacy: No obligation. We never share your information.
Valuation.successCopy: A Leo Realty expert will reach out within one business day with your free home valuation.

MortgageCalc.label: Mortgage Calculator
MortgageCalc.subcopy: Use this mortgage calculator to get a quick estimate of your monthly payment. KLE Mortgage's licensed loan originators (NMLS #2380070) are ready to help you find the perfect financing solution.
MortgageCalc.disclaimer: Estimates only. Actual rates, fees, and qualification determined by KLE Mortgage Financing, LLC. Leo Realty Capital Investments is not a mortgage lender.
MortgageCalc.valueProp2: VA loans with 0% down for veterans

Testimonials.label: Client Stories
Testimonials.headline: What Our Clients Say
Testimonials.t1Text: Leo Realty made finding my apartment incredibly easy. They understood exactly what I was looking for and had me in my new place within two weeks. Truly professional service.
Testimonials.t2Text: As a first-time homebuyer, I was nervous about the process. The team at Leo Realty walked me through everything. Their MR 2% commission saved me thousands. Couldn't be happier.
Testimonials.t3Text: I needed a commercial property that fit my budget and growth plans. Leo Realty Capital Investments found the perfect location. Their 32 years of experience really shows.
Testimonials.t4Text: Sold my home in just 21 days at asking price. Leopold's market knowledge and negotiation skills are unmatched. Leo Realty is the gold standard in South Florida real estate.

CTABanner.subcopy: Whether you're buying, selling, or renting — Leo Realty's team is ready to guide you every step of the way. For mortgage financing, our lending partner KLE Mortgage (NMLS #2380070) handles every loan. 32 years of trust. One call away.

Savings.label: MR 2% Advantage
Savings.headline: See How Much You Save
Savings.subcopy: With our exclusive MR 2% commission, you keep more of what your home is worth. See the difference vs. the 6% industry standard.

Footer.tagline: 32 years of trusted real estate expertise in South Florida. Mortgages Made Easy. Dreams Made Real.
Footer.lendingPartnerPrefix: Mortgage and lending services are provided by
Footer.lendingPartnerSuffix: (NMLS #2380070), our exclusive lending partner. Leo Realty Capital Investments is a licensed real estate brokerage and does not originate mortgage loans.
